caption: Want more hidden NYC gems like this? Comment “NYC” and I’ll send you my 7 day itinerary! #travelbucketlist #nycitinerary #nychiddengems #travelcontentcreator #thingstodoinnyc

transcription.text: 10 outdoor New York City gems you need to experience this spring. By the way, if you're into finding gems like this and want to experience the best of New York City without waiting years to discover them, I put together a seven-day itinerary that maps your entire trip out by neighborhood. Comment New York City and I'll send you the link.
